(3, 2).title: FireRing
(3, 2).description: A fire ring at the camp's centre, its stones black with years of smoke. The ring is well-maintained â€” ash cleared, wood stacked to one side in a manner that suggests habit rather than recent effort. A blackened iron pot hangs from a simple tripod above a bed of coals. The smell here is woodsmoke, dried meat, something with herbs.

(0, 2).title: WaterStep
(0, 2).description: A short muddy track ends at a platform of weathered planks spiked into the gravel bank. Drag marks in the mud show where the craft is regularly hauled up and launched. The river is close here â€” cold water and silt smell, the constant low sound of current. The far bank is a dark line through the grey.

props.name: Ferry Landing
props.description: A flat-bottomed craft sits on the gravel, rope-tied to the bank stake. It could carry two people and gear across the river.
props.idle_message: The ferry craft is tied at the landing, ready for the crossing west.
props.announce: The ferry craft is tied at the landing here.

(1, 2).title: RiversEdge
(1, 2).description: The camp's western edge meets the river approach â€” packed gravel dropping to the waterline in a shallow ramp worn by use. The river is wide here, grey-green, moving with a quiet authority. A flat-bottomed craft is pulled up on the gravel and tied to a stake driven into the bank. The far shore is visible: lower ground, darker soil.

(3, 0).title: CampEntry
(3, 0).description: The camp's east edge is marked by a line of weathered stakes driven into the gravel at intervals â€” a boundary worn smooth by seasons of river wind. The ground inside is packed harder than the bank beyond it, darkened by years of foot traffic. Lean-tos of oiled canvas stand to the west, angled against the prevailing wind. The smell of woodsmoke and dried meat is warm and immediate.

props.name: Jambo's Tent
props.description: A small merchant's tent pitched just inside the camp boundary, its canvas weathered but its sign cheerful: 'Jambo Heals U.'
props.idle_message: A small merchant's tent is pitched here with a hand-painted sign reading "Jambo Heals U."
props.announce: A small merchant's tent is pitched just inside the camp boundary.

props.name: Camp Boundary
props.description: A line of weathered stakes marks the camp's eastern edge. Beyond them, the bank continues east toward the descent road.
props.idle_message: The camp boundary leads back out to the descent road.
props.discovery_message: the camp boundary leading back east!
props.announce: The camp's eastern boundary opens onto the descent road.

(3, 4).title: CampFarEdge
(3, 4).description: The camp's southeast corner: a low windbreak of stacked stones marking the boundary, and beyond it the open bank continuing east. A cord strung between two stakes carries several small carved shapes â€” worn smooth, turning slowly in the river wind. The ground here is undisturbed gravel, untouched by the camp's foot traffic.

(3, 1).title: Supply Tents
(3, 1).description:
Several tents are arranged in a row on the low grass. Inside are various crates and burlap sacks containing all manner of supplies - food, cloth, rope, survival tools.
There's a wooden rack against which is propped several spears and one rusted-looking longsword.
It's clear that this is where denizens come to prepare for departure out into the wilds of Aurelion.

(3, 3).title: Camp
(3, 3).description:
The busy internals of camp are abundant here.
Tents with flaps partially closed, messy cookware left abandoned on the grass in places, and various personal effects leaning on rocks or covering logs all indicate people with lives underway.

(2, 2).title: Descending Path
(2, 2).description:
A dirt path winds westward here, down away from the center of camp. It grows markedly quieter as the white canvas tents shrink in the distance.
Tufts of green grass perforate the dusty carpet at inconvenient footfalls, forcing passersby into a forced state of prudence in their steps.
The musty smell of running water whispers in the breeze of the valley. In the distance, the rush of a river can be made out.

(2, 1).title: Camp
(2, 1).description:
The busy internals of camp are abundant here.
Tents with flaps partially closed, messy cookware left abandoned on the grass in places, and various personal effects leaning on rocks or covering logs all indicate people with lives underway.

(2, 3).title: Camp
(2, 3).description:
The busy internals of camp are abundant here.
Tents with flaps partially closed, messy cookware left abandoned on the grass in places, and various personal effects leaning on rocks or covering logs all indicate people with lives underway.

(4, 3).title: Tradepost
(4, 3).description:
A wooden scaffold holds up tent canvas in what must be the most architecturally abundant section of the camp. Lines of racks lean against the large wooden poles staked into the ground, holding a variety of armaments and protective gear.
Wide furrows of dirt cut through patches of grass - evidence of frequent traffic. People walk back and forth through this area, examining wares in casual conversation.

(4, 2).title: Camp
(4, 2).description:
The busy internals of camp are abundant here.
Tents with flaps partially closed, messy cookware left abandoned on the grass in places, and various personal effects leaning on rocks or covering logs all indicate people with lives underway.

(4, 1).title: Nursery
(4, 1).description:
A small wooden fence rings a clearing of short grass and dirt.
There's a length of twine strung across the only gap in the fence. Inside, several small wooden toys are scattered in the dust. 
A small wooden box sits with its lid wide open, as if hoping someone will notice its sad predicament.
